The Sculpture Tour

The Sculpture Tour

A public art project drawing attention to love

Chicago  ·  Summer 2026  —  and beyond

Scroll
About the project

We get what
we focus on.

The idea is simple: we get what we focus on, so I want to get the world thinking about love.

The strongest memories are created when an experience is tied to a feeling. The feeling of wonder these create, realizing the sculptures are made from nothing but sand and water, creates a lasting memory tied to the idea of love.

My hope is that this experience sparks a question we keep returning to: “How is love possible?”

I’m building these on beaches around the country, and eventually the world, as an invitation to reflect on love, possibility, and what we can create together.
